title: EP: Toggle visibility with non-empty password
precondition: Login form is displayed with password field
test_steps:
Enter a non-empty password, e.g., 'password123'
Observe password field is masked by default
Click the visibility toggle
Observe password becomes visible as plain text
Click the visibility toggle again
Observe password becomes masked again
expected_result: Toggle works correctly; characters are shown and hidden on successive clicks

title: DT: User toggles visibility – password becomes shown
precondition: Password field contains text and is currently masked
test_steps:
Enter a password, e.g., 'Secret1'
Verify password is masked
Click the visibility toggle
Verify password is displayed as plain text
expected_result: Password field switches to plain text

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
test_steps:
State: PasswordHidden
State: PasswordShown
State: PasswordHidden
expected_result: The password field displays masked (hidden) characters after toggling twice.
